full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Identifying valid CORE A* classical SVM papers (2009–2012)
full_llm_interaction_log.full_prompt: Suggest research papers that strictly satisfy: 2009–2012, CORE A* venue, classical ML method (SVM/GMM/ARIMA), methodological, CPU-only reproducible.
full_llm_interaction_log.llm_response_summary: Generated a filtered shortlist of classical SVM papers from NeurIPS, ICML, JMLR, PAMI, AAAI, and AISTATS.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped narrow the search to strictly eligible classical SVM papers.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Evaluating 'Analysis of SVM with Indefinite Kernels'
full_llm_interaction_log.full_prompt: Does 'Analysis of SVM with Indefinite Kernels' meet all Part A criteria?
full_llm_interaction_log.llm_response_summary: Confirmed it is NeurIPS 2009 (CORE A*), focuses on classical SVM with indefinite kernels, is methodological, and reproducible on CPU.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Validated that the selected paper satisfies venue, year, and classical method constraints.

full_llm_interaction_log.full_prompt: Give me a 30-word reason for choosing this paper.
full_llm_interaction_log.llm_response_summary: Provided a concise explanation emphasizing extension of classical SVM theory to indefinite kernels and strong theoretical contribution.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Produced a clear academic justification for submission.

full_llm_interaction_log.full_prompt: Can this paper be implemented in code?
full_llm_interaction_log.llm_response_summary: Confirmed that spectral correction and modified kernel SVM experiments can be implemented using Python and scikit-learn.

full_llm_interaction_log.full_prompt: Generate Python code for 'Analysis of SVM with Indefinite Kernels'.
full_llm_interaction_log.llm_response_summary: Provided implementation demonstrating indefinite kernel construction, eigenvalue analysis, spectral clipping, and SVM training.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Enabled practical reproduction aligned with theoretical discussion.

top_5_prompts.why_important: Confirmed full compliance of the selected paper with all exam constraints.
Ensured strict filtering of eligible CORE A* classical SVM papers.
Verified reproducibility on a CPU-only laptop.
Provided experimental code for practical validation.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Part A.
